唔似季中比人重點攻擊

Sunday’s results mean the Blues will finish in the Premier League’s top four…

A combination of the Blues’ big home victory over Watford on Sunday afternoon and the failure of both Manchester United and Arsenal to win their Sunday fixtures means Maurizio Sarri’s men are guaranteed to finish in the top four of the Premier League and therefore play in the Champions League next season.

While we were beating the Hornets at Stamford Bridge thanks to goals from Ruben Loftus-Cheek, David Luiz and Gonzalo Higuain, Manchester United were drawing 1-1 at already relegated Huddersfield Town to rule themselves out of a place in the first four places. Instead the Red Devils will have to settle for Europa League football in 2019/20.

In Sunday afternoon’s later game, Arsenal were in a winning position against Brighton and Hove Albion at the Emirates Stadium, Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang having scored an early penalty, but they conceded from the spot themselves in the second half and that game also ended 1-1.
So with Chelsea on 71 points and Arsenal on 67 with Man United one point further back, those sides can no longer overtake us.

Arsenal still have the possibility of drawing level on points with fourth-place Tottenham Hotspur who are on 70 points but their goal difference is heavily against them in the contest with their north London rivals. The Europa League remains a route into the Champions League for the Gunners.

Chelsea play away at Leicester City on the final day of the league season next Sunday where a win would confirm a third-place finish. Tottenham have a home game against Everton while Arsenal are away at Burnley.

Congratulations to Maurizio Sarri and the squad for securing our Champions League place with a game to spare! The next target is to make the Europa League final by beating Eintracht Frankfurt at Stamford Bridge on Thursday.

Sarri responds to Cahill's 'respect' comments
05/05/2019, 21:00
Share:


Maurizio Sarri hailed the veteran defender for his professionalism this season following Chelsea’s 3-0 win over Watford at Stamford Bridge, despite the English centre back comments earlier today.

Cahill criticised his manager in an interview with the Telegraph for his lack of playing time this season.

‘I see some of the situations with players who won the title with Chelsea, not just myself, and it just hasn’t been right, it makes it very hard for me to have respect for someone who has not respected what some of us have won with the club.’

When asked about Cahill’s comments, Sarri replied: ‘I do not know the situation. During the season he was very professional, he played only five six times, but he was important in the training ground and in the dressing room.

‘Today was the last match and it was important for him to stay on the pitch but it was important for the fans and him. Here Gary won everything, so I think he has to say goodbye.’

Mourinho: Jorginho is the best midfielder in Europe
03 MAY 2019, 17:30 DICKSON MOSE
Former Chelsea manager Jose Mourinho has heaped praise on Jorge Luiz, better known as Jorginho, labelling him the best midfielder in Europe.

Speaking after watching the midfileder in action in their 1-1 draw to Frankfurt in the first leg of Europa League semifinals, Mourinho said the Italian is a 'complete' midfileder.

"Jorginho is, for me, the best midfielder in Europe. The way he controls the game recovers turnovers of possession and maintains the pressure, it's incredible," he said.

The 27-year-old was brought to the Bridge by Maurizio Sarri from Napoli in the summer in a £50million deal and was immediately drafted into the first team.

He displaced Ngolo Kante from his favoured position in midfield and looked a perfect fit for the team in the early stages of 'Sarriball'.

Things have however changed over time, with the Italian coming under attack from fans over poor play, with boos and jeers greeting him on many occasions.

He has played in almost all of Chelsea's English Premier League matches and has always been the first name on the teamsheet for Sarri.

車路士隊長卡希爾（T.Cahill）正式宣佈今夏將離隊，藍軍將不得不告別這位為球隊效力了7年的功勳隊長。不過，卡希爾的告別也不是心平氣和的，他在告別之際公開表達了對主教練沙利（M.Sarri）的不滿。

卡希爾在告別採訪時，將矛頭對準了沙利。卡希爾表示：「對我個人而言，今季是非常糟糕的。當我離開車路士時，這個賽季的記憶會從我的腦袋里被抹掉，我的最後記憶會是上季的足總盃決賽。過去六個賽季裡，我經常出戰比賽，而我也助車路士贏得了一切，所以我不想在看台上觀看球隊比賽。」

卡希爾接下來直接抱怨了沙利，他表示：「如果一名球員連續兩場、三場、四場比賽沒法出場，那你無必要給他做出解釋。但如果你連續八九場沒讓他出場，那你就必須給他解釋一下了。但是，主教練卻對我從來沒有解釋過。說實話，我很難尊重那些，對球會功勳球員毫無尊重的人。」
　　
卡希爾在車路士已效力7個賽季，他助車路士贏得了2個聯賽冠軍，1個歐聯冠軍，1個聯賽盃冠軍，1個歐霸盃冠軍和2個足總盃冠軍。到了今季，卡希爾失去了主力位置，沙利截至目前，只給了卡希爾8次出場機會。正因此，卡希爾才對沙利心有不滿。

隊長...有d野，唔洗畫出腸

祖雲達斯射手希古恩今季獲借用至車路士，借用合約將於季尾完結，領隊沙利率先開腔，表明希望球隊可以留用這位阿根廷射手，認為他能夠提升球隊戰績。

沙利曾與希古恩在拿玻里合作無間，他表示不清楚對方的前途，但希望這位射手可以留隊，認為他能帶領球隊於下季交出好表現，沙利又補充指一位射手適應了西甲及意甲的風格後，改到英超賽場上比賽並不容易，因為各個聯賽的身體對抗程度不同。

自一月加盟後，希古恩於英超上陣 13 場，並攻入 5 球，表現不過不失，租用合約利明，車路士可於季尾以 3,200 萬鎊將他買斷，或是以 1,600 萬鎊再借用多一季。值得留意的是，目前車路士正就國際足協頒佈的轉會禁令上訴，如果失敗，球隊將無法簽入新球員。
